creator: knu@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks. 

I changed it slightly to use PATCHFILE/PATCH_SITES to apply distributed 
patches.  As a result, MASTER_SITES were separated into smaller sets of 
sites and thus (unavoidable) fetch errors were reduced.  Also I made it 
use patch 2.5 (devel/patch) instead of ignoring the errors with the patches 
that patch 2.1 cannot understand.  Check it out.
